summary: Tested i18n translations (DE/EN) across all dashboard pages and new features (satisfaction rating, Ollama integration, unanswered questions, CSV export). Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All i18n translations verified working correctly.

Backend: POST /api/chat/rate accepts rating=-1 (negative) - returns {ok: true}

Backend: POST /api/chat/rate rejects missing fields with 400

Backend: PUT /api/ai/config updates to Ollama with URL and model
Backend: GET /api/analytics requires Pro plan (403 for free user)
Backend: GET /api/analytics/export/csv requires Pro plan (403 for free user)
Backend: GET /api/analytics/export/csv requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/chat returns message_id in response
Backend: GET /api/embed.js includes ce-rating CSS and /api/chat/rate call

context_for_next_testing_agent: All i18n translations verified working for DE/EN across Dashboard, Billing, AI Settings, Privacy Center, and Analytics pages. Satisfaction rating API (POST /api/chat/rate) working with thumbs up/down (1/-1). Ollama integration configured via PUT /api/ai/config (falls back to Claude when Ollama unavailable - NO Ollama server running). Analytics and CSV export require Pro plan (test user on free plan gets 403). Embed.js includes rating buttons with thumbs up/down emojis.

mocked_apis.ollama_integration: MOCKED - no Ollama server running, falls back to Claude

satisfaction_rating.embed_js: Includes thumbs up/down buttons after assistant messages

ollama_integration.fallback: Falls back to Claude if Ollama unreachable

unanswered_questions.detection: Backend checks AI response for patterns like 'ich kann diese frage nicht beantworten'
unanswered_questions.display: Shown in Analytics page under 'Unbeantwortete Fragen' section
